meaning: n.以指距测量的人,测量机量扳手,[机]扳手
examples: Her ire slid between us like the spanner from Father's workshop, straining our hinge.
A spate of strikes has thrown a spanner into the workshop of the world.
Please give me the ring spanner.
Between them, the two votes have flung a large spanner in Mr Uribe's programme.
The others freed Tuesday were Danish photographer Johan Rydeng Spanner and peace activist Philip Latasha.
